# ARCA Server — LLM Context

## What is this project?
ARCA Server is a full-stack Argentine electronic invoicing system (facturación electrónica) that integrates with AFIP/ARCA web services. It allows businesses to issue invoices (Facturas A/B/C), credit notes, debit notes, and query taxpayer data — all through AFIP's official SOAP-based APIs.

## Architecture
- **Backend:** Express 5.2 (TypeScript 6), Prisma 7 (PostgreSQL, driver adapter), Zod 4, @ramiidv/arca-sdk
- **Frontend:** React 19.2, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS 4 (@tailwindcss/vite, no postcss.config), React Hook Form 7
- **SDK:** @ramiidv/arca-sdk v1.1+ handles all AFIP SOAP communication (WSFE, WSFEX, WSAA, Padrón)

## Key Files

### Backend
- `backend/src/index.ts` — Express app setup, middleware, routes
- `backend/src/config/index.ts` — Environment config (AFIP certs, JWT, DB)
- `backend/src/services/arca.service.ts` — Arca SDK instance with event logging
- `backend/src/services/invoice.service.ts` — Invoice/NC/ND creation with QR generation
- `backend/src/lib/prisma.ts` — Shared Prisma 7 client with PrismaPg adapter
- `backend/src/middleware/auth.ts` — JWT + hashed API key authentication
- `backend/src/middleware/errorHandler.ts` — Error handler with ArcaError support
- `backend/src/routes/afip.ts` — AFIP parameter/query endpoints (15 routes)
- `backend/src/routes/invoices.ts` — Invoice CRUD + NC/ND endpoints
- `backend/src/routes/auth.ts` — Auth + API key management
- `backend/src/routes/clients.ts` — Client CRUD
- `backend/prisma/schema.prisma` — DB schema (User, ApiKey, Client, Invoice, InvoiceItem)
- `backend/prisma.config.ts` — Prisma 7 config with datasource URL
- `backend/tests/arca-sdk.test.ts` — 48 tests (unit + integration)
- `backend/vitest.config.ts` — Test configuration

### Frontend
- `frontend/src/App.tsx` — Routes (13 pages)
- `frontend/src/api/client.ts` — Axios API client (25+ functions)
- `frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx` — Main layout with header, skip-link
- `frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx` — Navigation (5 sections: General, Facturación, Gestión, AFIP, Sistema)
- `frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` — Stats, recent invoices, AFIP status
- `frontend/src/pages/NewInvoice.tsx` — Invoice form with type-aware validation
- `frontend/src/pages/NewNotaCredDeb.tsx` — Credit/debit note creation
- `frontend/src/pages/InvoiceList.tsx` — Invoice listing with filters
- `frontend/src/pages/InvoiceDetail.tsx` — Invoice detail with QR link
- `frontend/src/pages/NewClient.tsx` — Client form with CUIT lookup from AFIP
- `frontend/src/pages/ConsultaComprobante.tsx` — Query invoices in AFIP
- `frontend/src/pages/AfipParams.tsx` — AFIP parameter reference + exchange rates
- `frontend/src/types/index.ts` — TypeScript types and constants

## AFIP Integration (via @ramiidv/arca-sdk)

The SDK wraps AFIP's SOAP web services:
- **WSAA** — Authentication (PKCS#7 signed TRA, token caching with dedup)
- **WSFE** — Electronic invoicing (CAE requests, parameter queries, CAEA)
- **WSFEX** — Export invoicing
- **Padrón A5/A13** — Taxpayer data queries

Key SDK methods used:
- `arca.facturar(opts)` — Simplified invoice creation (auto-calculates IVA, totals, numbering)
- `arca.notaCredito(opts)` / `arca.notaDebito(opts)` — NC/ND with type inference
- `arca.consultarCuit(cuit)` — Taxpayer lookup
- `arca.consultarComprobante(tipo, pv, nro)` — Invoice query
- `arca.getPuntosVenta()` — Sales points
- `arca.getTiposComprobante/Documento/Iva/Concepto/etc()` — AFIP parameters
- `arca.getCotizacion(monedaId)` — Exchange rates
- `arca.serverStatus()` — AFIP server health
- `Arca.generateQRUrl(input)` — Official AFIP QR URL
- `Arca.formatDate(date)` — Date formatting with Argentina timezone
- `Arca.calcularTotales(items)` — Preview IVA/totals without calling AFIP

## Invoice Types and Rules
- **Factura A (tipo 1):** Responsable Inscripto → RI. Requires CUIT. Discriminates IVA.
- **Factura B (tipo 6):** RI → Consumidor Final/Mono/Exento. DocTipo optional. Discriminates IVA.
- **Factura C (tipo 11):** Monotributista → anyone. DocTipo optional. Does NOT discriminate IVA.
- **NC/ND:** Created from existing invoices. Type auto-inferred (e.g., Factura B → NC B).
- **Service dates:** Only required when concepto = Servicios (2) or Productos y Servicios (3).

## Security
- Helmet with CSP, HSTS, referrer-policy, frame-ancestors:none
- API keys hashed with SHA-256 before storage
- JWT secret required (no insecure defaults)
- Rate limiting: 200 req/15min global, 20 req/15min auth
- CORS restricted to frontend origin
- SDK errors mapped to proper HTTP status codes

## Database (Prisma 7 + PostgreSQL)
- Uses driver adapter (@prisma/adapter-pg) — no Rust engine
- Generated client at `src/generated/prisma/`
- Single shared instance via `src/lib/prisma.ts`
- Models: User, ApiKey (hashed), Client, Invoice (with qrUrl), InvoiceItem

## Testing
- 48 vitest tests: SDK constants, formatDate, calcularTotales, extractCAE, generateQRUrl, error classes
- Integration tests auto-skip without certs (run with AFIP_CUIT env + certs in backend/certs/)
